  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Transforms canonical AST intent into graph-aware plan metadata for SQL compile stage.
      1. Supplies deterministic join-planning context to AST validation/SQL compile stages.

AstPlanningInterceptor.java​

AstPlanningInterceptor.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/graph/core/AstPlanningInterceptor.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Planner interceptor extension contract.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Provides before/after/error planner hooks for custom graph planning behavior.
      1. Supplies deterministic join-planning context to AST validation/SQL compile stages.

DefaultSchemaGraphInterceptor.java​

DefaultSchemaGraphInterceptor.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/graph/provider/DefaultSchemaGraphInterceptor.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Default no-op graph interceptor bean.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Keeps extension point active while preserving default deterministic behavior.
      1. Supplies deterministic join-planning context to AST validation/SQL compile stages.

JGraphTSchemaGraphEngine.java​

JGraphTSchemaGraphEngine.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/graph/provider/JGraphTSchemaGraphEngine.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: JGraphT-backed schema graph implementation.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Builds graph vertices/edges and runs shortest-path traversal for join discovery.
      1. Supplies deterministic join-planning context to AST validation/SQL compile stages.

DefaultJoinPathResolver.java​

DefaultJoinPathResolver.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/graph/provider/DefaultJoinPathResolver.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Primary join-path resolver implementation.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Uses retrieval candidates + graph engine + semantic model hints to compute JoinPathPlan.
      1. Supplies deterministic join-planning context to AST validation/SQL compile stages.

DefaultAstPlanningInterceptor.java​

DefaultAstPlanningInterceptor.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/graph/provider/DefaultAstPlanningInterceptor.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Default planner interceptor bean.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Keeps planning hook chain deterministic without altering plan output.
      1. Supplies deterministic join-planning context to AST validation/SQL compile stages.

DefaultAstPlanner.java​

DefaultAstPlanner.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/graph/provider/DefaultAstPlanner.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Default AST planner implementation.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Applies join-path context to AST planning output consumed by SQL compiler.
      1. Supplies deterministic join-planning context to AST validation/SQL compile stages.

SQL Compile/Execute Deep Dive​

This section explains the deterministic SQL compilation stack, operator/window rendering, guardrails, and the final compiled envelope consumed by execute stage.

Exact source

The sequence below follows actual compile call flow from compiler contract to specialized handlers and policy validation.

High-level code execution order (sql compile/execute)​

1Compiler entry: SemanticSqlCompiler.java -> DefaultSemanticSqlCompiler.java -> AstSqlCompiler.java.
2Compile state/envelope: CompileWorkPlan.java + CompiledSql.java + SemanticSqlConstants.java.
3Compilation hooks: AstCompilationInterceptor.java + DefaultAstCompilationInterceptor.java.
4Clause orchestration: AstClauseHandler.java + AstClauseHandlerRegistry.java + DefaultAstQueryAssemblyClauseHandler.java.
5Specialized clause handlers: predicate/metric/window/exists/subquery/function contracts + registries + defaults.
6Operator rendering: AstOperatorHandler.java + registry/context + default operator providers.
7Window function rendering: AstWindowFunctionHandler.java + registry + DefaultRowNumberWindowFunctionHandler.java.
8Policy/guardrails: SqlGuardrail.java + SemanticSqlPolicyValidator.java + DefaultSemanticSqlPolicyValidator.java.

SemanticSqlCompiler.java​

SemanticSqlCompiler.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/sql/core/SemanticSqlCompiler.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Top-level SQL compiler contract used by compile stage.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Stage resolves this compiler and invokes compile(...) on canonical AST input.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

DefaultSemanticSqlCompiler.java​

DefaultSemanticSqlCompiler.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/sql/compiler/DefaultSemanticSqlCompiler.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Primary SQL compiler orchestrator implementation.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Builds compile plan, invokes clause/operator/window handlers, then emits CompiledSql.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

AstSqlCompiler.java​

AstSqlCompiler.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/sql/core/AstSqlCompiler.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: AST-to-SQL compiler SPI used by orchestrator.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Provides canonical compile entry method for AST + planning context.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

CompileWorkPlan.java​

CompileWorkPlan.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/sql/core/CompileWorkPlan.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Mutable work plan while assembling SQL and parameters.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Accumulates select/from/joins/where/group/having/order/limit and named params before final render.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

CompiledSql.java​

CompiledSql.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/sql/core/CompiledSql.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Final compiled SQL envelope.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Carries SQL text, named params map, metadata for execute and audit stages.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

SemanticSqlConstants.java​

SemanticSqlConstants.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/sql/core/SemanticSqlConstants.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Shared constants used by compiler and handlers.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Keeps token/alias/prefix constants centralized to avoid compile drift.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

AstCompilationInterceptor.java​

AstCompilationInterceptor.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/sql/interceptor/AstCompilationInterceptor.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Compilation interceptor contract.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Supports before/after/error hooks around SQL compile for custom audit or mutation.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/sql/interceptor/DefaultAstCompilationInterceptor.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Default no-op compilation interceptor bean.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Preserves deterministic compile behavior while enabling extension chain ordering.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

JAVA

  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Each handler decides support(...) and applies clause mutations onto CompileWorkPlan.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

JAVA

  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Supplies deterministic ordered handler list consumed by compiler orchestrator.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

JAVA

  • Runtime role: Clause assembly orchestrator handler.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Coordinates core query assembly flow and delegates specialized clause handlers.
      1. Expands required tables from all AST references (where/having/exists/subquery/sort/group/projections/time-range/metrics) before join assembly.
      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

      1. Participates in deterministic SQL compile pipeline before execute stage uses CompiledSql.

Result Summary/ Wrapper Deep Dive​

This section explains how semantic execution rows are transformed into final summary output, and how runtime wrapping returns the final semantic envelope.

Exact source

Sequence below follows summary generation first and runtime wrapper orchestration last.

High-level code execution order (result summary/wrapper)​

1SemanticResultSummarizer.java defines summary contract for result stage.
2DefaultSemanticResultSummarizer.java generates final summary text/markdown table.
3SemanticQueryRuntimeService.java wraps overall stage lifecycle and emits final runtime envelope.

SemanticResultSummarizer.java​

SemanticResultSummarizer.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/summary/SemanticResultSummarizer.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Summary contract used by result-summary stage.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Defines summarize(...) API that converts execution rows and context into final user-facing summary text.
      1. Feeds final assistant output shaping and runtime tool response consistency.

DefaultSemanticResultSummarizer.java​

DefaultSemanticResultSummarizer.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/summary/DefaultSemanticResultSummarizer.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Default summarizer implementation for semantic query results.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Builds concise markdown/table output and fallback messages from execution rows.
      1. Feeds final assistant output shaping and runtime tool response consistency.

SemanticQueryRuntimeService.java​

SemanticQueryRuntimeService.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/runtime/core/SemanticQueryRuntimeService.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Runtime wrapper/orchestrator around full semantic stage pipeline.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Wraps stage execution, error handling, and top-level runtime envelope returned to tool layer.
      1. Feeds final assistant output shaping and runtime tool response consistency.

AST Deep Dive​

This section explains the AST package folder-by-folder and how one user sentence is transformed into deterministic SQL-safe structure.

What AST layer actually does

The AST layer is the semantic contract between LLM output and SQL compiler input.

  • LLM can propose shape.
  • AST layer normalizes, canonicalizes, and validates that shape.
  • SQL compiler never compiles raw user text.

Folder map and runtime responsibility​

AST package map

FolderPrimary classesResponsibility
ast/coreSemanticQueryAstV1, AstFilter, AstFilterGroup, AstSort, AstOperatorVersioned incoming AST contract from LLM JSON.
ast/normalizeDefaultAstNormalizerField alias normalization + deterministic rule application.
ast/versionV1CanonicalAstMapper, AstCanonicalizerConvert V1 payload to canonical internal model.
ast/canonicalCanonicalAst, CanonicalFilterGroup, CanonicalSubquerySpecCompiler-facing strict AST model.
ast/validateDefaultAstValidator, AstValidationResultStrict semantic validation before SQL compile.

Step-by-step with one real conversation​

User ask:

  • show billbank gaps with request and order details

1) ast/core: parse raw JSON into typed AST (SemanticQueryAstV1)​

SemanticQueryAstV1 core shape
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/core/SemanticQueryAstV1.java
JAVA
SemanticQueryAstV1 explained line-by-line
JAVA

What it means:

  • Every top-level query intent is explicit and typed.
  • This avoids dynamic map parsing later in compiler stages.

2) ast/core: operator normalization (AstFilter, AstSubqueryFilter)​

AstFilter.operatorEnum() alias normalization
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/core/AstFilter.java
JAVA

What it means:

  • LLM/operator variants (contains, IS NOT, NOT IN) are normalized before validation.
  • Aggregate-style tokens (COUNT_GT, SUM_GTE, etc.) are normalized to base operators.
  • Prevents enum failures from natural-language operator tokens.

3) ast/normalize: deterministic cleanup + intent rule application​

DefaultAstNormalizer.normalize() high-level flow
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/normalize/DefaultAstNormalizer.java
JAVA

What it means:

  • Maps field aliases to canonical semantic field keys.
  • Drops unknown fields that do not belong to chosen entity (including select and projections).
  • Applies deterministic business overrides through intent_rules.
  • Fails fast when normalization drops all predicates or selected fields, instead of compiling broad fallback SQL.

4) behavior change now implemented (important)​

Metric-aware rule override skip (new behavior)
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/normalize/DefaultAstNormalizer.java
JAVA
boolean metricRequestedByAst = metrics != null && !metrics.isEmpty();
boolean allowForceWithMetrics = rule != null && Boolean.TRUE.equals(rule.forceModeEvenWithMetrics());
boolean allowDetailForce = !metricRequestedByAst || allowForceWithMetrics;

if (!ast.metrics().isEmpty() && normalizedGroupBy.isEmpty() && questionMentionsAnyMetric(question, ast.metrics())) {
// preserve aggregate intent for direct metric asks like "show billbank_gap_count"
normalizedSelect = List.of();
normalizedProjections = List.of();
}

if (allowDetailForce && rule != null && rule.forceSelect() != null) {
// apply force_select for detail AST, or when rule explicitly allows metric override
}

boolean forceDetail = allowDetailForce
  && rule != null
  && "detail".equalsIgnoreCase(rule.forceMode());

What it means:

  • If AST carries metrics, detail-force is skipped by default.
  • Per-rule override: when force_mode_even_with_metrics: true, force_select and force_mode=detail are still allowed.
  • For explicit metric-name asks (for example show billbank_gap_count), normalizer now preserves metric intent by clearing accidental detail projections.
  • Projection-drop guard allows metric-only ASTs (non-empty metrics with empty select/projections) so aggregate queries are not falsely rejected.
  • SQL compiler also treats metric-only AST as metric-only SELECT and qualifies metric SQL table names to query aliases (zp_* -> t*) to avoid PostgreSQL FROM-clause errors.
  • This keeps aggregation safe globally while enabling explicit business-intent exceptions.

5) ast/version: V1 to canonical mapping (V1CanonicalAstMapper)​

V1CanonicalAstMapper.from(...)
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/version/V1CanonicalAstMapper.java
JAVA

What it means:

  • Compiler receives one strict shape (CanonicalAst) regardless of LLM formatting quirks.
  • Mapping stage is where unsupported operators are rejected with explicit error.

6) ast/canonical: compiler-safe model​

CanonicalAst fields used by compiler
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/canonical/CanonicalAst.java
JAVA

What it means:

  • This is the only AST consumed by SQL compile.
  • Keeps compilation deterministic and isolated from prompt-level noise.

7) ast/validate: strict semantic contract enforcement​

DefaultAstValidator key checks
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/validate/DefaultAstValidator.java
JAVA

What it means:

  • Unknown entity/field/operator/type mismatch fails early.
  • Prevents invalid SQL from being generated downstream.

How this AST becomes SQL (bridge summary)​

AST-to-SQL bridge

AST elementCompiler impactExample
where.conditionsPredicate handlers generate parameterized where SQL`requestStatus = :p1`
exists.where + `$field` valueCorrelated field comparison (field-to-field)`exj1.zp_disconnect_id = t0.zp_disconnect_id`
metrics + group_by + havingMetric clause + having compile path`COUNT(...)`, `GROUP BY`, `HAVING`
windowsWindow function renderer`ROW_NUMBER() OVER (...)`
sort/limit/offsetOrder/pagination clause`ORDER BY ... LIMIT :__limit`

Real AST example and normalized effect​

Incoming AST (mixed detail + metric)
JSON
Normalizer decision matrix (conceptual)
TEXT

What happens when AST is missing​

If LLM fails to produce valid AST JSON:

  • AST_ERROR / AST_GENERATION_ERROR is emitted.
  • Runtime returns controlled semantic failure (no SQL compile/execute).
  • RUNTIME_ERROR captures final failure envelope.

Complete AST file-by-file source + explanation​

Exact source

Each file below shows source and concise execution notes.

High-level code execution order​

1SemanticQueryAst.java -> SemanticQueryAstV1.java parse LLM JSON into typed AST payload.
2Core AST nodes (AstFilter.java, AstFilterGroup.java, AstSort.java, AstOperator.java) normalize operator/value shape.
3AstNormalizer.java + DefaultAstNormalizer.java apply alias mapping and intent-rule rewrites.
4Version conversion starts with AstPayload.java -> AstVersionAdapterRegistry.java -> V1AstVersionAdapter.java.
5V1CanonicalAstMapper.java maps V1 AST into canonical nodes.
6AstCanonicalizer.java emits CanonicalAst.java used by downstream validator/compiler.
7Canonical model files (CanonicalFilterGroup.java, CanonicalSubqueryFilter.java, etc.) keep compile input deterministic.
8Validation path: AstValidator.java -> AstSemanticValidator.java -> DefaultAstValidator.java.
9AstValidationResult.java returns valid/errors for stage audit and SQL compile gate.

SemanticQueryAst.java​

SemanticQueryAst.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/core/SemanticQueryAst.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Incoming LLM AST payload contract and enum/value normalization.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Defines typed AST contract node parsed from LLM JSON.
      1. Used by normalizer/mapper before compile.

DefaultAstNormalizer.java​

DefaultAstNormalizer.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/normalize/DefaultAstNormalizer.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Normalization contracts and deterministic repair/cleanup implementation.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Takes raw V1 AST and semantic model context from runtime stage.
      1. Normalizes field aliases and applies deterministic intent-rule rewrites.
      1. Prunes unknown fields across select, projections, filters, sort, group_by, where, and having for selected entity safety.
      1. Keeps metrics-safe behavior by default, but allows per-rule override via force_mode_even_with_metrics.
      1. Emits normalized AST for canonical mapping and validation.

AstPayload.java​

AstPayload.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/version/AstPayload.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Version adapters and mappers that convert payloads into canonical AST.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Version dispatch and mapping from payload to canonical AST.
      1. Isolates AST version concerns from compiler/runtime.

DefaultAstValidator.java​

DefaultAstValidator.java source
file: src/main/java/com/github/salilvnair/convengine/engine/mcp/query/semantic/ast/validate/DefaultAstValidator.java
JAVA

What this file does:

  • Runtime role: Validation contracts and strict semantic validation implementation.
  • Detailed control flow:
      1. Validates entity/field/operator/value compatibility against semantic model.
      1. Validates exists/subquery/window/group/metric semantic rules.
      1. Produces explicit validation errors and blocks compile if invalid.

Post feedback + rebuild embeddings​

Use this flow to validate that thumbs feedback is now improving semantic retrieval ranking.

  1. Apply required tables in DB:
Postgres DDL for feedback + semantic embeddings
SQL
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ce_mcp_user_feedback ( feedback_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, conversation_id uuid NOT NULL, feedback_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, message_id VARCHAR(128), intent_code VARCHAR(255), state_code VARCHAR(255), user_query TEXT, assistant_response TEXT, mcp_tool_code VARCHAR(255), captured_query_knowledge_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, applied_query_knowledge_json jsonb, metadata_json jsonb, created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT ce_mcp_user_feedback_conversation_fkey FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id) REFERENCES ce_conversation(conversation_id)
  on DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ce_user_query_knowledge ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, conversation_id uuid, feedback_id BIGINT, feedback_type VARCHAR(32), tool_code VARCHAR(255), intent_code VARCHAR(255), state_code VARCHAR(255), query_text VARCHAR(1000) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(2000), prepared_sql TEXT, tags VARCHAR(2000), api_hints VARCHAR(2000), embedding TEXT, metadata_json jsonb, created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL ); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ce_mcp_semantic_embedding ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, namespace VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, target_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, target_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, embedding vector NOT NULL, metadata_json jsonb, created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL, updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now() NOT NULL );
  1. Required application.yml:
application.yml (semantic mode + vector enabled)
YAML
mcp:
  db:
    query:
      mode: semantic # semantic-catalog | knowledge-graph | semantic

  semantic-catalog:
    enabled: true

  knowledge-graph:
    enabled: true

  semantic:
    enabled: true
    model-path: classpath:/mcp/semantic-layer.yaml
    sql-dialect: postgres
    timezone: UTC
    vector:
      enabled: true
      feedback-enabled: true # when false, USER_QUERY feedback embeddings are ignored
      table: ce_mcp_semantic_embedding
      namespace-column: namespace
      target-type-column: target_type
      target-name-column: target_name
      embedding-column: embedding
      metadata-column: metadata_json
      max-results: 20
  1. Enable semantic vector mode:
  • mcp.db.query.mode=semantic
  • mcp.db.semantic.enabled=true
  • mcp.db.semantic.vector.enabled=true
  • mcp.db.semantic.model-path=classpath:/mcp/semantic-layer.yaml
  1. Rebuild base semantic embeddings from YAML:
Embedding rebuild API
HTTP
POST /api/v1/db/semantic/embeddings/rebuild
Content-Type: application/json
{
  "namespace": "semantic-model:telecom_ops",
  "clearNamespace": true,
  "includeEntities": true,
  "includeTables": true
}
  1. Run a baseline semantic query:
  • Show failed disconnect requests in last 24 hours
  1. Send thumbs-up feedback for that conversation:
Feedback API (thumbs up)
HTTP
POST /api/v1/conversation/feedback
Content-Type: application/json
{
  "conversationId": "<conversation-id>",
  "feedbackType": "THUMBS_UP"
}
  1. Ask a semantically similar question in a new conversation:
  • List failed disconnect orders from past day

Expected retrieval behavior:

  • Candidate reasons should include feedbackVector when USER_QUERY embeddings contributed to ranking.
  • Entity/table ranking should become more stable for similar asks.
  1. Verify DB rows:
Verification SQL
SQL
select
  feedback_id, feedback_type,
  mcp_tool_code, created_at
from ce_mcp_user_feedback
order by created_at desc
limit 10; select id, tool_code, query_text, (embedding is not null) as has_embedding, created_at from ce_user_query_knowledge
order by created_at desc
limit 20; select namespace, target_type, target_name, created_at from ce_mcp_semantic_embedding
where target_type = 'USER_QUERY'
order by created_at desc
limit 20;

Extension model (consumer override points)​

Extensibility contracts

ConcernContractConsumer pattern
RetrievalSemanticEntityTableRetriever, SemanticVectorSearchAdapterProvide higher-order bean; keep default as fallback.
Graph backendSchemaGraphEngineAdd new adapter (for example Neo4j) and set higher precedence.
AST generationSemanticAstGenerator + LlmClientOverride model/provider prompt behavior without compiler changes.
AST validationAstValidator + AstValidationInterceptorAdd stricter rules or domain checks.
SQL compileClause/operator/window handlers + registriesDrop-in new handler class, no compiler switch-case changes.
SQL policySemanticSqlPolicyValidatorCustomize allowed-table/limit policy.
Runtime hooksSemanticQueryStageInterceptorEmit custom audit/metrics for each stage.
